values: Workbook Maintenance Guide / 填写说明
Use one of the four requested member groups; keep the PI separate.
使用四类成员分类；负责人单独保留。
Existing years are retained. Leave missing years blank until confirmed.
保留现有年份，未确认的时间保持空白。
Record undergraduate and master's institutions when available.
本科、硕士院校有可靠信息时分别填写。
Only the doctoral-granting institution is required.
博士后仅填写博士毕业院校。
Prefer official institutional pages or admission/graduation notices.
优先填写学校官网、录取或毕业公示等官方来源。
Leave blank and add a note; do not infer from a common name alone.
无法唯一对应时留空并备注，不仅凭同名推断。
